call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about consolidating some credit card debt. 
Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a significant amount on interest. The monthly payment would be around $200. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's just verify a few details...

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We believe this card could offer you valuable rewards and benefits. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, our card offers cash back on all purchases, and a lower APR after six months of responsible use. 
Robert: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm getting tired of these calls. Put me on your do-not-call list. 
Agent: I understand, sir. I can certainly do that. I apologize again for disturbing you. 
Robert: Just… just do it. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, I did mention I was looking at options. 
Agent: Wonderful! So, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm starting a small online business, and I need some capital for inventory and marketing. 
Agent: That's fantastic! A great entrepreneurial spirit. We can definitely help with that. Have you been looking at other lenders? 
Jessica: Yeah, I got a quote from Bank of America, but their rate was a little higher, like 13.5%. 
Agent: Ah, okay. Well, our rate is more competitive, and we also offer flexible repayment terms. We can tailor a plan to fit your business needs. Plus, we have a dedicated small business support team. 
Jessica: That sounds good. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $200 origination fee, but that's it. No hidden charges. We believe in keeping things simple. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. I need to think about it a little more. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms via email. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great.

Agent: Hello Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, right. Yeah. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 16.99%. This card offers excellent rewards points on travel and dining. 
Michael: Hmm, that's… okay. I'm not a big traveler, though. 
Agent: Well, we also have rewards for everyday purchases, like groceries and gas. And a 0% introductory APR for the first six months. 
Michael: I'm already pretty happy with my current card, to be honest. It has a good rewards program, and the APR isn't terrible. 
Agent: I understand. We just wanted to make sure you were aware of all your options. 
Michael: Yeah, I appreciate that. But I think I'll stick with what I have. 
Agent: No problem at all, Michael. Thank you for your time. Have a great day!

Agent: Hello Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. 
Patricia: (Very agitated) Oh, it's you people again! I told you yesterday, and the day before, I am NOT interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the repeated calls. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at an interest rate of 22.99%. 
Patricia: 22.99?! That's highway robbery! I'm on a fixed income! This is harassment! I'm going to report you to the authorities! 
Agent: Ma'am, please calm down. I can remove your number from our list immediately. 
Patricia: You better! And I want a guarantee I won't receive another call from your company ever again! This is outrageous! (Hangs up abruptly)
